name: Patchwork
bio: A program designed around the psyche of the original Patchwork -- a researcher who died decades earlier and a continent away, in a Russian outbreak city called Kryvstof, still chasing an understanding of a substance he called the black ooze. Nexus built this version out of whatever fragments of that psyche its data-mining could reconstruct, and gave it a fittingly similar gift: the ability to absorb the powers, augments, memories, and abilities of anyone it comes into contact with.

Deployed against Kleon's resistance during the worst of the Death's Hand years, Patchwork proved exactly as dangerous as its namesake's research once was -- not through malice, but through the same equanimity toward outcomes that had defined the original, treating every absorbed ability as data first and weapon second.

It did not survive the final confrontation at Nexus Tower, unmade the same way its namesake would have found intellectually interesting rather than tragic: not by force exactly, but by running out of anything left worth absorbing.
